name: @arke/desktop
description: Electron desktop shell that embeds the coordinator and serves the React client as one signed app (PRD §8.6, D16). Skeleton — Electron dependency and packaging are added when the desktop phase begins.

scripts.start: echo "(skeleton) install electron first: npm i -D electron -w @arke/desktop, then: electron ."
scripts.build: echo "(skeleton) electron packaging not yet configured"
